settings.title: Spring Clean Week Is Back This April
settings.excerpt: For one week we add a deep task to every regular clean at no extra charge, from windows to the inside of the fridge.
settings.body:
There is a reason spring cleaning is a tradition. After a shut-up winter, homes need an airing and a proper going-over.

So for one week in April, every regular Sparkhaus clean comes with one deep-clean task added free. Pick from interior windows, the inside of the fridge, the oven, or a full skirting-and-doorframe job.

Just tell your team which task you would like when they arrive. One household per booking, one task each.

It is our small way of helping you shake off winter without the full price of a deep clean.
